subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the Call from the Master of the Crimson Ark from the shores of 'Akká, which hath been designated as the Spot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع الندآء من مالک السفینه الحمرآء من شطر العکاء التی سمیت بالبقعه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
